description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This printed top can be worn to beat the heat in style with a pair of shorts and flip flops. Product Details Printed multi-coloured top, has raglan short sleeves which flares towards the cuffs from elasticated band in the middle, has lace detailing at the cuffs, round neckline and elasticated hemline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
